calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Stephen L. Porter, Esq.,for Plaintiff: 100 Bush Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sheron Chiu, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1 -Credit Application --------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 -47 pages - statement of account and cpies of individual invoices----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Letter of 11/14/06 - U.S. Food Service -------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: United Native Depository Corporation as follows:
Damages $263,678.46
Attorney Fees: $5,514.58
Costs $772.40
Total Judgment: $269,965.44.
Counsel stipulated to the return of the exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
